Name: CustomAutoStorage
Description: Automatically transfers items to nearby chests containing the same resource

Permissions.Name: autostorage.use
Permissions.Description: Allows the use of AutoStorage features.

Permissions.Name: autostorage.craft
Permissions.Description: Allows crafting AutoStorage when permission is required.

Permissions.Name: autostorage.config.any
Permissions.Description: Allows configuring any AutoStorage chest, even if not the owner.
